title: Token Credential
description: Base token credential schema. Concrete payment handlers may extend this schema with additional fields and define their own constraints.

type.description: The specific type of token produced by the handler (e.g., 'stripe_token').

constraint.title: Token Credential Constraint
constraint.description: Constraint entry indicating support for generic token credentials. This intentionally only matches `type: token` and does not define a `constraints` body; handler-specific token credential schemas should define their own constraint entries for handler-specific token types and constraint keys.

funding_sources.description: Constraints against the underlying funding sources behind the token.
